arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Aston Villa - Mikey Moore starts among four changes
arts.sum: Here's the Tottenham team Postecoglou has selected to face Villa on Sunday afternoon. Ange Postecoglou has made four changes to his Tottenham Hotspur side as they take on Aston Villa in the FA Cup fourth round on Sunday afternoon with barely a moment to rest after their previous cup disappointment.

arts.ttl: It's easy to stick boot in to Spurs - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou says the criticism of his side is "really easy".

arts.ttl: Tottenham and West Ham worried they could miss out on 29-G/A target
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United are keen on signing Jonathan David on a free transfer at the end of the season. The 25-year-old Canadian international will be a free agent in the summer, and he has decided not to renew his contract with French outfit LOSC Lille. arts.ttl: Tottenham looking to raid London rivals for 21-year-old Englishman
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton. A report from Football Transfers claims that they could look to sign the 21-year-old England international at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Chelsea 'confident' of winning race for £70m-rated Premier League star amid Tottenham competition
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly confident that they will pip London rivals Tottenham Hotspur to the signing of Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi in the summer.
